text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning after a day off, and I spot
Mayano Top Gun. I call out her name, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Stop it! Close your eyes! Don't look this way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I was practicing putting on makeup yesterday, and before I knew it, the sun was already up...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: My eyes are so dark I look like a panda!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Waaah! You're not allowed to see me like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like she didn't get enough rest on her day
off...
